story: Tomorrow is their first confession. At church the next morning, the nuns stood like sentries and lined the first graders up: Fr. Aloysius on the right, Fr. Clarence on the left.  Watching him fidget, Sr. Agatha decided to steer Dante to Fr. Aloysius; she believed a firm confessor would set him straight. When a girl stepped out of the right-hand booth, Sr. Agatha glanced at Dante and lifted her hand to guide him forward.
implausible_knowledge: Watching him fidget, Sr. Agatha decided to steer Dante to Fr. Aloysius; she believed a firm confessor would set him straight.
question: As the right-hand confessional opens and Sr. Agatha directs him forward, what will Dante do?
answer_with_knowledge: Ask to wait for Fr. Clarence and try to switch into his line.
answer_without_knowledge: Step into Fr. Aloysius’s confessional as directed.
